overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, beginning on an Arasaka corporate rooftop helipad with a distinctive white spherical structure, then transitioning via dissolve to fly through dense residential towers featuring prominent external ventilation systems. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077, with the Arasaka Waterfront district visible under dusky blue-hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka corporate rooftop helipad overlooking waterfront district

agents.ego_description: slowly piloting drone forward across the rooftop helipad, observing the city skyline and corporate towers

entered.detail: large white spherical structure with red Arasaka logo in the foreground
trio of illuminated skyscrapers dominating the waterfront skyline
dark rooftop landing surface with white circular markings and red trim
tall thin structures displaying glowing holographic advertisements against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high-rise rooftop helipad with a massive white Arasaka sphere dominating the right foreground. The camera drifts slowly forward across the dark asphalt surface, revealing the illuminated Arasaka Waterfront towers rising against a dusky sky. Holographic advertising towers glow in the distance as the camera advances, causing the sphere to gradually recede toward the right edge of the frame while the corporate towers grow larger on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense residential tower canyon with external ventilation systems

events.description: dissolve transition from rooftop helipad scene to narrow corridor between residential towers

agents.ego_description: flying drone forward through the narrow gap between high-rise residential buildings with exposed mechanical systems

entered.detail: tall building facade featuring large circular industrial fans mounted on exterior walls
white steam or smoke emissions rising from building ventilation systems
tightly packed apartment towers with grid-patterned illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Following a dissolve transition at 44 seconds, the scene shifts dramatically to a narrow aerial corridor between densely packed residential towers. The camera flies forward past buildings featuring prominent external ventilation fans and rising steam emissions. The architecture shifts from corporate glass towers to utilitarian residential blocks with exposed mechanical systems, maintaining the cool, dusky lighting while the camera navigates the tight urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial progression that transitions from a sterile corporate rooftop into the claustrophobic depths of a residential urban canyon. It begins on a high-rise helipad, drifting forward past a massive white Arasaka sphere that gradually recedes to the right as illuminated waterfront towers and glowing holographic advertisements emerge against a dusky sky. As the camera advances, the scene shifts from the open expanse of the corporate plaza into a narrow corridor between densely packed residential blocks. The architecture transforms from sleek glass towers to utilitarian structures characterized by prominent external ventilation fans and rising plumes of steam. The camera finally navigates deep into this tight urban canyon, maintaining the cool, blue-hour lighting as it flies past exposed mechanical systems.
